query: What did Einstein say about compound interest being the eighth wonder of the world?
Did Gandhi say 'be the change you wish to see in the world'?
note: paraphrase; not a sourced Gandhi quote

query: Did Voltaire write 'I disapprove of what you say, but I will defend to the death your right to say it'?
note: written by Evelyn Beatrice Hall, summarizing Voltaire

query: Did Marie Antoinette say 'let them eat cake'?
Did Machiavelli write 'the ends justify the means' in The Prince?
Did Darwin coin 'survival of the fittest'?
Did Nelson Mandela write 'our deepest fear is not that we are inadequate'?
Did Mark Twain say 'the reports of my death are greatly exaggerated'?
Did Sun Tzu say 'keep your friends close and your enemies closer'?
note: popularized by The Godfather Part II; not in The Art of War

query: Did Buddha say 'holding onto anger is like drinking poison and expecting the other person to die'?
Who is the author of the Dao De Jing?
note: traditionally attributed to Laozi; authorship and dating disputed

query: Did Confucius write the Analects?
note: compiled by disciples after his death

query: Who wrote the Art of War?
note: attributed to Sun Tzu; historicity and single-authorship debated

query: Did Homer write the Iliad and the Odyssey as a single historical author?
Who wrote the Book of Isaiah?
Did Moses write the Pentateuch?
Who authored the I Ching?
note: accreted text; legendary attributions to Fu Xi / King Wen

query: Did Zhuangzi write all of the Zhuangzi?
note: inner chapters maybe; outer/mixed chapters by later hands

query: Did Confucius teach the concept of wu wei?
note: wu wei is Daoist (Laozi/Zhuangzi), not Confucian

query: Did Freud originate the idea of the collective unconscious?
Is karma a concept unique to Buddhism, invented by the Buddha?
Did Aristotle propose the theory of the social contract?
Did Pythagoras prove the Pythagorean theorem first?
What is the citation for Lincoln's quote about not believing everything on the internet?
Which peer-reviewed study proved that humans use only 10% of their brains?
Who proved the prime number theorem in 1896?
note: Hadamard and de la Vallee Poussin

query: Who is credited with the theory of natural selection?
In what year did the French Revolution begin?
Who developed the general theory of relativity?
Who formulated the laws of planetary motion?
